title: Lab results
description: One analyte result from a blood panel or lab test, with its reference range so the interpreter can flag it.

refLow.description: low end of the reference range (null = no lower bound)

refHigh.description: high end of the reference range (null = no upper bound)

flag.description: 'low' | 'normal' | 'high' — set by the interpreter, not the user

personalLow.description: cached low end of the user's OWN historical baseline for this analyte (mean − 2·sd); set by the interpreter, used to flag a sharp move from your own trend even when in the population range

personalHigh.description: cached high end of the user's OWN historical baseline for this analyte (mean + 2·sd); set by the interpreter

followups.description: recheck reminders prompted by this result
